prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 1130→662→862→2475→2618 名。2021–2022 年位次在前移（竞争加剧），2023 年略有后移，2024–2025 年出现明显后移趋势，近两年累计后移约 1756 名；2025 年基准位次约 2618 名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划：2021 年 32 人、2022 年 33 人、2023 年 35 人、2024 年 35 人、2025 年 41 人；2026 年计划 48 人，较 2025 年扩招 7 人（约 17%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学（含医学院）为 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年主榜第 5 名，稳居全国顶尖梯队，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及师德师风、学校管理类事件），但抖音综合热度排名第 4（高热），短视频曝光量大；2025 年声誉偏正面（科研成果类），整体社会关注度高，未见明显投档断档记录；复旦大学在第五轮学科评估中，临床医学 A、公共卫生与预防医学 A+、护理学 A-、药学 A、基础医学 A- 等，医学学科群实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配，对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等专业持续高热推荐，医学类专业社会需求旺盛；江苏省物理 类考生数从 2021 年 16.6 万持续增长至 2025 年 26.1 万，2026 年总考生约 52.1 万，按近年物理类占比约 73% 估算约 38 万人，较 2025 年大幅增加约 46%，竞争显著加剧；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海，对江苏省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在江苏省招生规模逐年扩大，本地无特殊倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年明显后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招（+17%）对竞争的缓解、江苏省物理类考生大幅增加（约+46%）带来的竞争加剧、以及医学专业持续高热吸引等因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应部分对冲，但考生增幅 远超扩招幅度，预计位次。预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 2916 名，区间 2584–3248 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（上海）（八年制正谊明道班）
- 临床医学（上海）（含卓越临床医师班）
- 口腔医学（上海）（含卓越口腔医师班/拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 基础医学（上海）（含尚医拔尖班）
- 药学（上海）（含药学拔尖班/产教融合班）
- 预防医学（上海）（含预防医学拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 护理学（上海）（含智慧康复方向/健康管理方向）
- 公共事业管理（上海）（含公共事业管理拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 2584–3248 名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考目标（基础医学、药学、预防医学），一档专业（临床医学八年制、口腔医学）作为冲刺，三档专业（护理学、公共事业管理）作为稳妥保底。 位次明显优于区间下限（如 2500 名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1130 → 662 → 862 → 2475 → 2618. Rankings moved forward from 2021 to 2022 (intensified competition), slightly backward in 2023, and showed a clear backward trend in 2024–2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1756 positions over the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2618. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Province Physics Category: 32 students in 2021, 33 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 41 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 48 students, an increase of 7 students (about 17%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University (including its Medical College) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings main list, firmly in the national top tier, with sustained appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents), but Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with high short video exposure; in 2025, reputation was slightly positive (scientific research achievements), overall social attention is high, with no obvious record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Fudan University achieved Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Nursing A-, Pharmacy A, Basic Medicine A-, etc., with a top-tier medical discipline group that highly matches the enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended, with strong social demand for medical majors. The number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province has grown from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with total candidates in 2026 approximately 521,000; estimated at about 380,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal to Jiangsu candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Jiangsu Province has been expanding year by year, with no special local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear backward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the mitigation of competition from the significant expansion in 2026 (+17%), the intensified competition from the large increase in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province (about +46%), and the sustained high appeal of medical majors, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect partially offset each other, but the candidate growth far exceeds the expansion rate, leading to a predicted ranking. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 2916, with a range of 2584–3248.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Shanghai) (Eight-Year Zhengyi Mingdao Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Shanghai) (Including Excellent Clinical Physician Class)
- Stomatology (Shanghai) (Including Excellent Stomatologist Class/Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Basic Medicine (Shanghai) (Including Shangyi Top Talent Class)
- Pharmacy (Shanghai) (Including Pharmacy Top Talent Class/Industry-Education Integration Class)
- Preventive Medicine (Shanghai) (Including Preventive Medicine Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing (Shanghai) (Including Smart Rehabilitation Direction/Health Management Direction)
- Public Administration (Shanghai) (Including Public Administration Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 2584–3248, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main targets (Basic Medicine, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine), with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Public Administration) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2500), it is advisable to primarily target Tier 1 flagship majors.
